Variables.Name: SourceType
Variables.Description:
Whether the module uses Verts or Surfaces for locations.
	 
	 	VERTSURFACESOURCE_Vert		- Use Verts as the source locations.
	 	VERTSURFACESOURCE_Surface	- Use Surfaces as the source locations.

Variables.Name: UniversalOffset
Variables.Description: An offset to apply to each vertsurface

Variables.Name: bUpdatePositionEachFrame
Variables.Description: If true, update the particle locations each frame with that of the vertsurface

Variables.Name: bOrientMeshEmitters
Variables.Description: If true, rotate mesh emitter meshes to orient w the vertsurface

Variables.Name: bInheritBoneVelocity
Variables.Description: If true, particles inherit the associated bone velocity when spawned

Variables.Name: InheritVelocityScale
Variables.Description: A scale on how much of the bone's velocity a particle will inherit.

Variables.Name: SkelMeshActorParamName
Variables.Description: The parameter name of the skeletal mesh actor that supplies the SkelMeshComponent for in-game.

Variables.Name: ValidAssociatedBones
Variables.Description: This module will only spawn from verts or surfaces associated with the bones in this list

Variables.Name: bEnforceNormalCheck
Variables.Description: When true use the RestrictToNormal and NormalTolerance values to check surface normals

Variables.Name: NormalToCompare
Variables.Description: Use this normal to restrict spawning locations

Variables.Name: NormalCheckToleranceDegrees
Variables.Description: Normal tolerance.  0 degrees means it must be an exact match, 180 degrees means it can be any angle.

Variables.Name: NormalCheckTolerance
Variables.Description:
Normal tolerance.  Value between 1.0 and -1.0 with 1.0 being exact match, 0.0 being everything up to
		perpendicular and -1.0 being any direction or don't restrict at all.

Variables.Name: ValidMaterialIndices
Variables.Description:
Array of material indices that are valid materials to spawn from.
	 	If empty, any material will be considered valid

Variables.Name: bInheritVertexColor
Variables.Description: If true, particles inherit the associated vertex color on spawn. This feature is not supported for GPU particles.

Variables.Name: bInheritUV
Variables.Description: If true, particles inherit the associated UV data on spawn. Accessed through dynamic parameter module X and Y, must be a "Spawn Time Only" parameter on "AutoSet" mode. This feature is not supported for GPU particles.

Variables.Name: InheritUVChannel
Variables.Description: UV channel to inherit from the spawn mesh, internally clamped to those available.

Variables.Name: EditorSkelMesh
Variables.Description: The name of the skeletal mesh to use in the editor
